commit_message:
[LANG-1810] Deprecate SOFT_MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH in favor of MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH (#1559)

* [LANG-1810] Deprecate SOFT_MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH in favor of MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH

* [LANG-1810] Add test coverage for MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH

* [LANG-1810] Rename new constant to SAFE_MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH and update Javadoc

---------

Co-authored-by: yelimkoo <lydia@tooning.io>
issue_summary: Public static fields must be final
javadoc_before:
/**
     * The {@code SOFT_MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH} constant from Java's internal ArraySupport class.
     *
     * @since 3.19.0
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * The {@code SOFT_MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH} constant from Java's internal ArraySupport class.
     *
     * @since 3.19.0
     * @deprecated This variable will be final in 4.0; to guarantee immutability now, use {@link #SAFE_MAX_ARRAY_LENGTH}.
     */
